items.title: Why IBM (IBM) Stock Is Up Today
items.description: Shares of technology and consulting giant IBM (NYSE:IBM) jumped 2.8% in the afternoon session after renewed enthusiasm for Alphabet reinvigorated the artificial intelligence trade, propelling a market rebound heading into the Thanksgiving holiday.

items.title: Apple cuts jobs across sales team
items.description: An Apple spokesperson told Reuters that the company is continuing to hire and the affected employees can apply for new roles.  The impacted ⁠employees include account ‌managers serving major businesses, schools and government agencies, according to Bloomberg ‍News, which had reported the news earlier in the day.  Staff who operate Apple's briefing centers for institutional ​meetings and product demonstrations for prospective customers were ‌also affected, Bloomberg said.

items.title: Pure-Play vs Big Tech in Quantum: How IBM, NVDA, IONQ Stand at '25 End
items.description: IBM, Google and NVIDIA's quantum advances and pure-play gains like IonQ's surge highlight a fast-evolving 2025 landscape where investors weigh upside against risk.

items.title: AMD Showcases AI Momentum as Zyphra Trains First Large-Scale MoE Model on Its Hardware
items.description: Zyphra adopts AMD Instinct GPUs for advanced foundation model training.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Up As Alphabet, Tesla Jump; These Health Plays Test Entries (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index and the Nasdaq rose on the stock market today, with Tesla and Alphabet among AI stocks jumping. Health stock tested entries.
